message:
feat(frame): add Series.agg() multi-function aggregation and Series.groupby()

Add two pandas-compatible Series methods:

Series.agg(funcs):
- Matches pd.Series.agg(["sum", "mean", "std"]) semantics
- Accepts a slice of function name strings and returns a new Series
  with function names as index labels and aggregation results as values
- Supports: sum, mean, min, max, std, var, count, median, prod, sem,
  skew, kurt/kurtosis, nunique, first, last
- Returns CompatibilityRejected error for unknown function names

Series.groupby(by):
- Matches pd.Series.groupby(by) semantics
- Takes a grouping Series of the same length and returns a
  SeriesGroupBy object supporting aggregation methods
- Validates length alignment between data and grouping Series

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
